global.description: The ad features a vibrant design promoting the game 'NeonArena' with a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Compete in NeonArena and earn rewards.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: NeonArena logo
elements.description: A bold, stylized logo featuring the text 'NeonArena' in a vibrant color, prominently displayed at the top.

elements.label: Game icons
elements.description: Four circular game icons arranged in a grid, each with a simple design, set against a bright background.

elements.label: Gameplay preview
elements.description: A visual representation of gameplay, showing interactive elements and vibrant graphics in the center.

elements.label: Gameplay icons
elements.description: Additional gameplay icons or elements displayed below the main gameplay preview, maintaining a cohesive design.

elements.label: Left decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element positioned on the left side, adding visual interest without being a focal point.

elements.label: Right decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element on the right side, complementing the overall design of the ad.

elements.label: Top small icon
elements.description: A small icon located near the top, likely representing a feature or aspect of the game.

elements.label: Center small icon
elements.description: Another small icon positioned in the center, contributing to the overall theme of the ad.

elements.label: Left small icon
elements.description: A small icon on the left side, adding detail to the ad's design.

elements.label: Center left small icon
elements.description: A small icon positioned centrally on the left, enhancing the visual appeal.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The main headline 'Beat your rivals' in a large, bold font, conveying the competitive nature of the game.

elements.label: Supporting text
elements.description: A descriptive text below the headline, stating 'Free rewards for new players' in a clear, readable font.
elements.text_content: Beat your rivals Free rewards for new players

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom with the text 'Install now', encouraging immediate action from viewers.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, playable, bright and playful, NeonArena, rewards for new players, install now.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by gameplay elements in the center, and the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: NeonArena, Beat your rivals, Free rewards for new players, Install now
